prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) forced induction via Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer, 76mm exducer) with custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei Powered, supporting 12psi boost for ~500whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing sequential fuel injection and individual cylinder timing

KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension with 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, spherical top mounts, and 10kg/mm front / 12kg/mm rear spring rates, paired with Cusco 22mm front / 20mm rear adjustable sway bars and SuperPro 80mm extended lower control arms for camber correction

AP Racing 6-piston CP8650 front brake calipers with 380mm 2-piece floating rotors (J-Hook slotted, 32mm thickness) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with 2-piston CP8620 rear calipers and 345mm rotors, utilizing Motul RBF660 brake fluid and Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (G37 Sedan-specific, 3-piece front fenders, 2-piece rear fenders, and custom carbon fiber side skirts) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG DBC basecoat) and 3M 2080 Satin Black vinyl roof wrap

Seibon Carbon fiber GT-style hood (G37 Sedan-specific, 30% weight reduction, dual central vents) with custom LED halo daytime running lights integrated into the lower grille (Lux H8 5000K bulbs, Morimoto D2S projectors)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 19x9.5 +22 front / 19x10.5 +30 rear wheels (ET22/ET30, 5x114.3 PCD) with Toyo R888R 255/35/19 front and 285/30/19 rear tires, paired with Muteki SR48 lug nuts and custom extended wheel studs (12x1.25, 45mm length)
